description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof, featuring a mix of light blue and dark trim on its exterior walls. The front facade includes a covered porch with white railings, a small garden area, and a paved entryway. The upper floor has a spacious balcony with outdoor seating and two large cylindrical water tanks on the roof. The windows are arranged in horizontal bands, with some shaded by awnings, and the house is surrounded by a low brick wall and lush landscaping, including palm trees and flowering shrubs. The rear and side elevations show a combination of solid wall sections and large glass panels, providing both privacy and natural light. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor spaces, and a contemporary urban aesthetic.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, blue exterior, balcony, and landscaped garden, featuring horizontal windows and rooftop water tanks.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entry, covered porch, balcony, garden, and prominent landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the blue wall, upper balcony, rooftop tanks, and dense vegetation along the boundary.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the flat roof, large glass panels, palm trees, and a brick perimeter wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals more windows, rooftop features, and a mix of greenery and paved areas.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with horizontal bands and large glass panels
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a covered porch with white railings, steps, and landscaped approach
